name: CropX Soil Intelligence and Irrigation Optimization API
what_it_does: CropX soil intelligence and irrigation optimization REST API for agricultural enterprises, irrigation districts, and precision agriculture platforms to access real-time soil sensor data, irrigation recommendations, water usage analytics, and field-level soil health metrics — enabling automated irrigation scheduling, soil moisture monitoring, drainage management, and water efficiency optimization through CropX's IoT soil sensor network and AI-powered agronomic decision engine. Enables AI agents to manage soil sensor data for real-time field moisture monitoring automation, handle irrigation recommendation for AI-optimized watering schedule automation, access water usage analytics for irrigation efficiency reporting automation, retrieve nutrient analysis for soil health monitoring automation, manage field performance for crop productivity tracking automation, handle weather integration for climate-adjusted irrigation automation, access drainage monitoring for subsurface water management automation, retrieve soil temperature for crop stress analysis automation, manage alert for irrigation and soil anomaly notification automation, and integrate CropX with precision agriculture platforms, irrigation controllers, and farm management software for data-driven water management automation.
use_cases: Accessing real-time soil moisture data from CropX sensors for automated irrigation scheduling automation agents
Receiving AI-powered irrigation recommendations for water efficiency optimization in commercial crop production automation agents
Monitoring soil health metrics (moisture, temperature, nutrients) for field-level crop management automation agents
Integrating CropX soil data with precision agriculture platforms for variable rate irrigation and drainage management automation agents
not_for: Fields without CropX sensor deployment (API data requires physical sensor installation)
Urban or non-agricultural applications (CropX is agricultural soil intelligence platform)
Greenhouse or indoor horticulture (CropX focuses on field-scale outdoor agriculture)
best_when: An agricultural enterprise, irrigation district, or precision agriculture platform wanting AI agents to access real-time soil sensor data, receive irrigation recommendations, and automate water management through CropX's soil intelligence network.
avoid_when: SENSOR INSTALLATION REQUIRED: CropX API data requires physical CropX soil sensors installed in fields; automated sensor-free soil data assumption creates no_sensor_data for un-instrumented fields; automated must have CropX sensors deployed and calibrated in target fields. ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: CropX API access requires enterprise customer agreement; automated developer self-service access assumption creates no API endpoint; automated must be active CropX enterprise customer. SENSOR CONNECTIVITY REQUIRED: CropX sensors require cellular or LoRa connectivity for real-time data transmission; automated 100% connectivity assumption creates data gaps in poor-connectivity agricultural areas; automated must handle sensor connectivity gaps and data latency. CALIBRATION AFFECTS DATA QUALITY: CropX sensor accuracy depends on proper soil calibration; automated uncalibrated sensor data trust creates inaccurate irrigation decisions; automated must ensure sensors are calibrated for local soil type.

auth.notes: CropX uses API key + OAuth2 for enterprise API access. REST API with JSON. Tel Aviv, Israel HQ. Founded 2013 by Tomer Tzach. Products: Soil moisture sensors, irrigation recommendations, water usage analytics, soil health monitoring, drainage management, weather integration. SDKs: None public. Enterprise contract required. Global operations (US, Australia, Europe, Israel, South Africa). Backed by investors including Bonai Group, Sony Innovation. Competes with Sentek and Lindsay for soil sensing and irrigation optimization.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo data for approved customers; production requires sensor purchase + subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Sensor hardware purchase; annual software subscription per sensor; enterprise API access included
pricing.notes: Tel Aviv IL. Enterprise hardware + subscription. Per-sensor pricing. Global ag operations. Soil sensing IoT.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; real-time sensor data APIs optimized

known_agent_gotchas: PHYSICAL SENSOR REQUIRED: CropX API returns no data without deployed and connected CropX soil sensors; automated data-without-hardware assumption creates sensor_not_found; automated must have CropX sensors installed, calibrated, and transmitting data before API integration

SENSOR DATA IS NEAR-REAL-TIME NOT INSTANTANEOUS: CropX sensor data transmits at configured intervals (typically 15-60 minutes); automated instantaneous soil reading assumption creates slightly stale data; automated must account for sensor transmission interval in irrigation decision timing

IRRIGATION RECOMMENDATIONS ARE ADVISORY: CropX AI recommendations are decision support, not commands; automated auto-execute irrigation without agronomist review assumption creates potential over/under-irrigation; automated should implement human-in-the-loop for significant irrigation decisions

FIELD BOUNDARY MAPPING REQUIRED: CropX API requires field boundaries defined in the platform for spatial soil analysis; automated undefined field assumption creates field_not_found; automated must map field boundaries in CropX before requesting field-level analytics

WEATHER DATA INTEGRATION IS KEY: CropX irrigation recommendations incorporate local weather forecasts; automated weather-independent irrigation recommendation assumption misses predictive optimization; automated should provide location for weather-integrated irrigation scheduling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Agricultural IoT soil sensing. GDPR, farm data privacy. API key + OAuth2. Global. Sensor IoT and farm management data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Agricultural IoT. GDPR, farm data privacy. API key + OAuth2. Global. Soil sensor and irrigation data.
